emotional_tone: Warm, grounded, trustworthy, and culturally resonant. It should feel like an academic sanctuary—calm but efficient.

rules: No generic sans-serifs (Inter, Roboto) for headings.
Overlines/Labels must be uppercase with wide tracking.
Keep line-height tight for headings and relaxed for body text.

grid_system.dashboard: Control Room grid (gap-4 or gap-6). Use all available space.
grid_system.marketing: Tetris Grid, high asymmetry, gap-8 to gap-12.

spacing_and_layout.containers: Generous spacing. Use p-6, p-8, p-12. Avoid cramped forms.
spacing_and_layout.borders: 1px subtle solid borders (border-border) with no heavy drop shadows by default. Use 'Clay & Crisp' neumorphism selectively for primary action cards.
spacing_and_layout.radius: rounded-xl for primary containers, rounded-md for inner elements like inputs and buttons.

forms.inputs: bg-white border border-[#E4DFD5] text-[#1A2E16] focus:border-[#2D5A27] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#2D5A27] rounded-md p-3
forms.generator_card: bg-white border border-[#E4DFD5] rounded-xl p-6 sm:p-8 shadow-sm

navigation.header: Sticky top-0 z-50 bg-[#FDFBF7]/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-[#E4DFD5].

myhub_dashboard.lesson_card: bg-white border border-[#E4DFD5] rounded-xl p-5 hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-200 cursor-pointer flex flex-col gap-3
myhub_dashboard.tag: bg-[#EAE5DA] text-[#4A5B46] text-xs px-2.5 py-1 rounded-full font-medium

premium_modal.container: relative overflow-hidden bg-[#1A2E16] text-white rounded-2xl p-8 border border-[#4A5B46]
premium_modal.highlight: Use the abstract terracotta fluid artwork as a subtle background image with low opacity (10-20%)

animations.hover: Subtle -translate-y-1 and shadow-md on interactive cards.
animations.generator_state: Pulsing opacity on a subtle green glow when AI is generating the lesson plan.

hero_marketing.description: Friendly female teacher smiling in front of a whiteboard. Use in the marketing landing page hero section.

auth_background.description: Focused student/teacher at a laptop. Use as the 50% split-screen background image for the Login/Signup page.

premium_subscription_bg.description: Abstract fluid artwork in terracotta and green. Use as a low-opacity background texture inside the Premium Subscription Modal or Banner to make it feel high-end.

placeholder_texture.description: Intricate abstract earthy tones. Can be used for empty states or generic section backgrounds.

instructions_to_main_agent: Always use the provided JSON media URLs for images. NEVER use via.placeholder.com or similar dummy image services.
All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case based on role.
For the Lesson Plan Form, use Shadcn Select/Dropdown components customized to match the 'Forms' guidelines. Do not use native HTML <select>.
Implement the 'Crystal Glassmorphism' strategy for the header nav. It must use backdrop-blur-xl and bg-[#FDFBF7]/80.
In the Premium Subscription UI, do not use bright neon colors. Stick to the deep Forest Green (#1A2E16) background with Terracotta (#D95D39) accents and use the premium fluid texture image.
Ensure contrast passes APCA/WCAG standards. Text over images must have adequate dimming overlays or text-shadows.
For icons, install and use lucide-react (default) or @phosphor-icons/react for a more premium look.
When generating the PDF for download, ensure the layout is clean, high-contrast (black/dark green on white), and uses system-safe or embedded fonts.
